notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed describes visible events of the human path ten entering the Dayan array and obtaining immortal gu recipes. These are ordinary cultivation events visible to participants, not hidden knowledge. No private motives, secret plans, or knowledge gaps are directly supported by the source text. The fact that Star Constellation Immortal Venerable arranged the array and monitors the ten is already known to the participants (they are Heaven's Court disciples). No hidden fact candidate meets the criteria without speculation or extrapolation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
应生机进入大衍阵后获得炼丹师蛊方（一转到五转）但本命蛊是医师蛊，未获得医师蛊仙蛊方，感到失望。行为是'失望'这一情绪反应，但种子只描述了情绪结果，没有提供足够的行为动作来支撑一个明确的动机推断。失望是结果而非动机，无法从现有种子中可靠推断其行为背后的意图。
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed focuses on individual members of 人道十子 (Ten Human Path Disciples) undergoing cultivation trials in 大衍阵. While 人道十子 is a named group affiliated with 天庭 (Heavenly Court), the seed facts describe individual cultivation outcomes (孙元化 gets 皮影人蛊 recipe, 古霆 gets 乐师蛊 recipe, 应生机 gets 炼丹师蛊 recipe but no immortal recipe). There is no faction-level pressure, threat, resource competition, or collective stake described. The events are individual cultivation experiences within a training array arranged by 星宿仙尊. No faction/group faces pressure, interest conflict, or succession/inheritance issues. No collective actor has a concrete stake that would generate simulation-relevant pressure.
IF export filter quarantined 9 legacy old-schema branches.
